nasb.text: And while they were gathering together in Galilee, Jesus said to them, “The Son of Man is going to be delivered into the hands of men;

esv.text: As they were gathering in Galilee, Jesus said to them, “The Son of Man is about to be delivered into the hands of men,

cnv.text: 他們聚集在加利利的時候，耶穌對門徒說：“人子將要被交在人的手裡，

ccb.text: 他们聚集在加利利的时候，耶稣对他们说：“人子将要被出卖，交在人手里。

csbs.text: 他们聚集在加利利的时候，耶稣对门徒们说：“人子将要被交在人的手中。
